_README: AI Center config (NOT secret). Provider routing for APEX. API keys live in secrets/secrets.json (or env vars), NOT here. Ask APEX to change models for you.

user_answer._doc: The user-facing answer. Default brain = Groq (fast, free-tier cloud).

internal._doc: Internal tasks (intent classify, style extraction). Cheaper/smaller models per tier.

_fallback_note: If the chosen provider is down/unconfigured, fall back to this one (local Ollama).
_ollama_cloud_note: For a remote/cloud Ollama, change ollama_host and set ollama_auth_header to 'Bearer TOKEN'.
